## Testing

## Checklist

- [ ] Perspective files follow the structure (core principles, anti-patterns, judgment criteria, output format)
- [ ] Anti-patterns are concrete (not "be careful" but "don't say X, say Y instead")
- [ ] Tested with at least 2 real questions
- [ ] No company-specific confidential information included
